Class NumberParameter<T extends Number & Comparable<T>>

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter<T>
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.NumberParameter<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the object type of the Number contained in this parameter
Direct Known Subclasses:
FloatParameter, IntegerParameter
public class NumberParameter<T extends Number & Comparable<T>> extends Parameter<T>

Defines the contract for a parameter which contains comparable numbers. Gets the parser function for the specific type of number (e.g., Integer.parseInt(String) or Float.parseFloat(String)) as a parameter in the constructor. Provides the methods setMinimumValue(Number), setMaximumValue(Number), and setBounds(Number, Number) for setting minimum and maximum values for the stored value.

Overrides the parse(String) method to apply the parser function on the String representation. If the parser function returns null, or if any Exception is thrown by the parser function, the parse(String) implementation returns an empty Optional. If the value returned from the parser function is less than the set minimum value or greater than the set maximum value, the implementation logs a warning and returns an empty Optional. Otherwise, an Optional containing the value returned from the parser function is returned.

See Also:
  • parse(String)
  • Parameter

  • Comparable

  • Constructor Details

    • NumberParameter

      public NumberParameter(Function<String,T> parser)
      Constructs a number parameter that uses the given parser function to parse the String representation of numbers. The parser function should return null or throw an Exception when the String representation is invalid.
      Parameters:
      parser - the parser function
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input parser is null

  • Method Details

    • setMinimumValue

      public NumberParameter<T> setMinimumValue(T minimumValue)
      Sets the minimum allowed value for this parameter.
      Parameters:
      minimumValue - the minimum allowed value (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this

    • setMaximumValue

      public NumberParameter<T> setMaximumValue(T maximumValue)
      Sets the maximum allowed value for this parameter.
      Parameters:
      maximumValue - the maximum allowed value (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this

    • setBounds

      public NumberParameter<T> setBounds(T minimumValue, T maximumValue)
      Sets the minimum and maximum allowed values for this parameter.
      Parameters:
      minimumValue - the minimum allowed value (inclusive)
      maximumValue - the maximum allowed value (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this

    • parse

      public Optional<T> parse(String valueString)

      Parses the given String representation of a number using the stored parser function.

      Special cases:

      • Returns an empty Optional if the parser function returns null or throws an Exception
      Specified by:
      parse in class Parameter<T extends Number & Comparable<T>>
      Parameters:
      valueString - the String representation of the number
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the parsed numerical value, or an empty Optional if the parser function returns null or throws an Exception
